mapper.select:
select v.activityalias_ , v.businessstate_ , t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.project_order , t1.org_model , t1.user_id , t1.dept_id , t1.leader_dept , t1.project_leader , t1.company_manager_id , t1.science_user_id , t1.plan_start_date , t1.plan_end_date , t1.fund_budget , t1.fund_expenditure , t1.project_node , t1.this_month_plan , t1.next_month_plan , t1.this_month_xtwt , t1.this_month_cyuser , t1.expense_execution_rate , t1.fund_execution_rate , t1.plan_status , t1.wr_year , t1.wr_month , t1.status , t1.bpm_task_id , t1.remark , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_workreport t1 left join bpm_client_hist_procinst_v v on t1.id = v.formid_
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.SECRET_LEVEL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.secretLevel}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectId}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectName}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_ORDER like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectOrder}),'%')
and t1.ORG_MODEL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgModel}),'%')
and t1.USER_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.userId}),'%')
and t1.DEPT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.deptId}),'%')
and t1.LEADER_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.leaderDept}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_LEADER like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectLeader}),'%')
and t1.COMPANY_MANAGER_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.companyManagerId}),'%')
and t1.SCIENCE_USER_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.scienceUserId}),'%')
and t1.PLAN_START_DATE >= #{bean.planStartDateBegin}
and t1.PLAN_START_DATE <= #{bean.planStartDateEnd}
and t1.PLAN_END_DATE >= #{bean.planEndDateBegin}
and t1.PLAN_END_DATE <= #{bean.planEndDateEnd}
and t1.FUND_BUDGET like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fundBudget}),'%')
and t1.FUND_EXPENDITURE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fundExpenditure}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_NODE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectNode}),'%')
and t1.THIS_MONTH_PLAN like concat(concat('%',#{bean.thisMonthPlan}),'%')
and t1.NEXT_MONTH_PLAN like concat(concat('%',#{bean.nextMonthPlan}),'%')
and t1.THIS_MONTH_XTWT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.thisMonthXtwt}),'%')
and t1.THIS_MONTH_CYUSER like concat(concat('%',#{bean.thisMonthCyuser}),'%')
and t1.EXPENSE_EXECUTION_RATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.expenseExecutionRate}),'%')
and t1.FUND_EXECUTION_RATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fundExecutionRate}),'%')
and t1.PLAN_STATUS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.planStatus}),'%')
and t1.WR_YEAR like concat(concat('%',#{bean.wrYear}),'%')
and t1.WR_MONTH like concat(concat('%',#{bean.wrMonth}),'%')
and t1.STATUS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.status}),'%')
and t1.BPM_TASK_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.bpmTaskId}),'%')
and t1.REMARK like concat(concat('%',#{bean.remark}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_01 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute01}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute02}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute03}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_04 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute04}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_05 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute05}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_06 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute06}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_07 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute07}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_08 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute08}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_09 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute09}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_10 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute10}),'%')
and exists (select 1 from BPM_CLIENT_HIST_TASK_V os where os.task_b_id_ = t1.id and os.assignee_ = #{bean.currUserId})
and v.businessstate_ = #{bean.bpmState}
and ${sfnConditions.sql}
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.project_order , t1.org_model , t1.user_id , t1.dept_id , t1.leader_dept , t1.project_leader , t1.company_manager_id , t1.science_user_id , t1.plan_start_date , t1.plan_end_date , t1.fund_budget , t1.fund_expenditure , t1.project_node , t1.this_month_plan , t1.next_month_plan , t1.this_month_xtwt , t1.this_month_cyuser , t1.expense_execution_rate , t1.fund_execution_rate , t1.plan_status , t1.wr_year , t1.wr_month , t1.status , t1.bpm_task_id , t1.remark , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_workreport t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_workreport
id,
secret_level,
project_id,
project_name,
project_order,
org_model,
user_id,
dept_id,
leader_dept,
project_leader,
company_manager_id,
science_user_id,
plan_start_date,
plan_end_date,
fund_budget,
fund_expenditure,
project_node,
this_month_plan,
next_month_plan,
this_month_xtwt,
this_month_cyuser,
expense_execution_rate,
fund_execution_rate,
plan_status,
wr_year,
wr_month,
status,
bpm_task_id,
remark,
created_by,
creation_date,
last_updated_by,
last_update_date,
last_update_ip,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
attribute_01,
attribute_02,
attribute_03,
attribute_04,
attribute_05,
attribute_06,
attribute_07,
attribute_08,
attribute_09,
attribute_10,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leaderDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectLeader,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{companyManagerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{scienceUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{fundBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{fundExpenditure,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{projectNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thisMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nextMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thisMonthXtwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thisMonthCyuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{expenseExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fundExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{planStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{wrYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{wrMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bpmTaskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=DATE},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=DATE},

insert into pm_project_workreport( id, secret_level, project_id, project_name, project_order, org_model, user_id, dept_id, leader_dept, project_leader, company_manager_id, science_user_id, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, fund_budget, fund_expenditure, project_node, this_month_plan, next_month_plan, this_month_xtwt, this_month_cyuser, expense_execution_rate, fund_execution_rate, plan_status, wr_year, wr_month, status, bpm_task_id, remark, created_by, creation_date, last_updated_by, last_update_date, last_update_ip, version, created_dept, org_identity, attribute_01, attribute_02, attribute_03, attribute_04, attribute_05, attribute_06, attribute_07, attribute_08, attribute_09, attribute_10)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orgModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.leaderDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectLeader,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.companyManagerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.scienceUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.fundBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.fundExpenditure,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.projectNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.thisMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nextMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.thisMonthXtwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.thisMonthCyuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expenseExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fundExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.planStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.wrYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.wrMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bpmTaskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute09,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.attribute10,jdbcType=DATE} from dual
mapper.update:
update pm_project_workreport
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_order =#{projectOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_model =#{orgModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id =#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_id =#{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leader_dept =#{leaderDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_leader =#{projectLeader,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_manager_id =#{companyManagerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
science_user_id =#{scienceUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_start_date =#{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE},
plan_end_date =#{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE},
fund_budget =#{fundBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
fund_expenditure =#{fundExpenditure,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
project_node =#{projectNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
this_month_plan =#{thisMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
next_month_plan =#{nextMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
this_month_xtwt =#{thisMonthXtwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
this_month_cyuser =#{thisMonthCyuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expense_execution_rate =#{expenseExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fund_execution_rate =#{fundExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_status =#{planStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wr_year =#{wrYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wr_month =#{wrMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status =#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bpm_task_id =#{bpmTaskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark =#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=DATE},
attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=DATE},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update pm_project_workreport set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_order =#{projectOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_model =#{orgModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id =#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id =#{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leader_dept =#{leaderDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_leader =#{projectLeader,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company_manager_id =#{companyManagerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, science_user_id =#{scienceUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_start_date =#{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, plan_end_date =#{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, fund_budget =#{fundBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, fund_expenditure =#{fundExpenditure,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, project_node =#{projectNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, this_month_plan =#{thisMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, next_month_plan =#{nextMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, this_month_xtwt =#{thisMonthXtwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, this_month_cyuser =#{thisMonthCyuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expense_execution_rate =#{expenseExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fund_execution_rate =#{fundExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_status =#{planStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wr_year =#{wrYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wr_month =#{wrMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status =#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bpm_task_id =#{bpmTaskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark =#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=DATE}, attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=DATE} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update pm_project_workreport set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_order =#{item.projectOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_model =#{item.orgModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id =#{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id =#{item.deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leader_dept =#{item.leaderDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_leader =#{item.projectLeader,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company_manager_id =#{item.companyManagerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, science_user_id =#{item.scienceUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_start_date =#{item.planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, plan_end_date =#{item.planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, fund_budget =#{item.fundBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, fund_expenditure =#{item.fundExpenditure,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, project_node =#{item.projectNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, this_month_plan =#{item.thisMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, next_month_plan =#{item.nextMonthPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, this_month_xtwt =#{item.thisMonthXtwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, this_month_cyuser =#{item.thisMonthCyuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expense_execution_rate =#{item.expenseExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fund_execution_rate =#{item.fundExecutionRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_status =#{item.planStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wr_year =#{item.wrYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wr_month =#{item.wrMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status =#{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bpm_task_id =#{item.bpmTaskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark =#{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{item.attribute09,jdbcType=DATE}, attribute_10 =#{item.attribute10,jdbcType=DATE} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};
